commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an inline pencil/input rename control to Control UI sidebar session rows, persists custom labels in a new localStorage map, and updates session display tests and CSS.

PR surface: Source +279, Tests +127. Total +406 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR. Source inspection confirms current main has backend/session-page label editing but no sidebar rename control, and the PR changes that user-facing path without a live UI run.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer action to rework the implementation around the existing label contract and provide real UI proof; this should not be repair-marked while external real behavior proof is missing.

target.title: feat(control-ui): allow renaming sessions in sidebar (#90655)
target.body:
## Summary

Closes #90655.

Adds a display-only rename affordance to Control UI sidebar session rows. Hovering a session reveals a small edit (pencil) button; clicking it turns the row into an inline input. Pressing Enter (or blurring) saves the new label; Escape cancels.

- New `ui/src/ui/session-rename-store.ts`: localStorage-backed `sessionKey -> customLabel` map under key `openclaw.controlUi.sessionLabels.v1`. Labels are trimmed, capped at 120 chars, and an empty value clears the entry.
- `resolveSessionDisplayName` in `ui/src/ui/session-display.ts` prefers a saved custom label over the server-provided `label`/`displayName`, while still applying the typed `Subagent:` / `Cron:` prefixes.
- `ui/src/ui/app-render.ts` adds the rename button + inline edit input to `renderSidebarRecentSession`. Edit-mode state is scoped per `AppViewState` via a module-level `WeakMap` to avoid widening `AppViewState`.
- Minimal CSS in `ui/src/styles/layout.css` for the rename button (hover-reveal) and the inline input.

Display-only label persistence in browser storage; no backend changes, no protocol changes, no schema migrations. Happy to gate this behind a setting or change the UX surface (context menu, dedicated modal, etc.) based on maintainer feedback.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior addressed: Sidebar session rows can be renamed inline; the custom label persists across reloads via localStorage; the underlying session key is unchanged.
- Real environment tested: Local Control UI source checkout on this worktree. New unit tests cover store persistence + `resolveSessionDisplayName` precedence; no Crabbox/E2E run was executed for this PR.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/session-rename-store.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-render.helpers.node.test.ts`.
- Evidence after fix: `Test Files  2 passed (2) / Tests  78 passed (78)`.
- Observed result after fix: New `session-rename-store.node.test.ts` (11 tests) green, existing `app-render.helpers.node.test.ts` (67 tests) still green; no other Control UI tests touched by this change.
- What was not tested: Visual screenshot of the rename button states (hover/active/focus) in Crabbox; cross-browser localStorage edge cases (quota exceeded); a11y audit for the inline input.
target.author: lonexreb
